title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM SE (Subject Elements) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM SE (Subject Elements) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw subject elements data, (2) Derive USUBJID and SESEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: ETCD, ELEMENT, SESTDTC, SEENDTC, TAETORD, (4) Handle element assignment from trial design, element date derivation, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 5056 records.
